zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge於1388年12月27日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯劍橋大學默里 科華士時，她的父親lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March14歲，母親Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton18歲。她於1408年5月23日與Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年9月22日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾金斯 明日香享年22歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge于1388年12月27日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯劍橋大學默里 科華士时，她的父亲lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March14岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton18岁。她于1408年5月23日与Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年9月22日在英国英格兰賀特福爾金斯 明日香享年22岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾金也斯 明日香。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge was born on 27 December 1388, in New Forest, County Westmeath, Ireland, her father, lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, was 14 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, was 18. She married Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge on 23 May 1408. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 22 September 1411, in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 22, and was buried in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge est née le 27 décembre 1388, à New Forest, County Westmeath, Irlande, son père, lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge le 23 mai 1408. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1411, à Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterrée à King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge am 27. Dezember 1388 in New Forest, County Westmeath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March 14 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton 18. Sie hat am 23. Mai 1408 Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. September 1411 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge è nata il il 27 dicembre 1388 nel New Forest, County Westmeath, Irlanda, sua padre, lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge il 23 maggio 1408. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 settembre 1411, nel Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolta a King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridgeが1388年12月27日にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスニュー フォーエストで生まれた時，父lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of Marchは14歳，母Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness cheretonは18歳であった。1408年5月23日にRichard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年9月22日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキングズ ラングリーで22歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge(이)가 1388년 12월 27일 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 뉴 포레스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1408년 5월 23일 Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 9월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 킨그스 랭글리에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 킨그'스 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1388, em New Forest, County Westmeath, Irlanda, seu pai, lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge em 23 de maio de 1408. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge родилась 27 декабря 1388 г. в местности ню форест, коунти вестмит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge 23 мая 1408 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 сентября 1411 г. в местности кингс лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 22 лет и была похоронена в местности кинг'с лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge nació el 27 de diciembre de 1388, en New Forest, County Westmeath, Irlanda, su papá, lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge el 23 de mayo de 1408. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1411, en Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultada en King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
